_publications._publicationTitle: Vinblastine/Methotrexate for Debilitating and Progressive Plexiform Neurofibroma in Children and Young Adults with Neurofibromatosis Type 1: A Phase 2 Study.

_contextSnippet: However, 5 of the 13 identified as SD by 2D measurements were actually PD by 3D analysis
resourceName: Response Evaluation in Neurofibromatosis and Schwannomatosis (REiNS)
details: 2D measurements missed progressive disease in 5 of 13 cases compared to 3D volumetric analysis; 5 participants identified as stable disease by 2D were actually progressive disease by 3D analysis
